widgets.title: Execution State

widgets.text: Daemon execution is active again after the manager-binding failure period.

widgets.text: Parallel execution has been restored across core build and launch-support lanes, with continued watch on evidence quality and continuity.

widgets.title: Support / Monitoring Watchlist
widgets.text: Risk remains in support and monitoring lanes due to manager-binding fragility, partial churn, and no-op cycle risk. Monitor pulse, archivist, efficiency, platform, and exec confirmation flow closely.
